shortDescription.en: Translate all Shopify store resources into any target language with a preview-first, approval-based workflow
shortDescription.zh: 用先预览再执行的流程，将 Shopify 店铺所有资源翻译成目标语言

longDescription.en: Translate your entire Shopify store — products, collections, pages, blogs, shop policies, menus, and more — into any target language. The skill checks your current language and market configuration, fetches all translatable content with its digest values, uses AI to translate every field in full without truncation, generates a CSV audit table for review, and writes approved translations to Shopify only after explicit confirmation. After translation, it verifies the stored content has no encoding corruption and guides you through market configuration — enabling the new locale in the right markets, creating new markets with subfolder URLs, and setting the correct default language for each region.
longDescription.zh: 将整个 Shopify 店铺——商品、集合、页面、博客、店铺政策、导航菜单等——翻译成任意目标语言。该技能会检查当前语言和市场配置，获取所有可翻译内容及其 digest 值，使用 AI 进行完整翻译（绝不缩略），生成 CSV 审计表供审核，并在明确确认后才将翻译写入 Shopify。翻译完成后，技能会验证存储内容无编码损坏，并引导您完成市场配置——在正确的市场中启用新语言、创建带子文件夹 URL 的新市场、为每个地区设置正确的默认语言。

introduction.en: Go from zero to a fully translated Shopify store in one workflow: language setup, market configuration, AI translation, CSV audit, and approved writes.
introduction.zh: 一个工作流完成店铺翻译全流程：语言配置、市场设置、AI 翻译、CSV 审计、批准写入。

description.en: Checks existing locales, enables and publishes new languages, and adds them to the correct Shopify Markets with the right URL structure.
description.zh: 检查现有语言，启用并发布新语言，并将其添加到正确的 Shopify Markets 及 URL 结构中。

description.en: Translates all 30 Shopify translatable resource types. Prioritizes products, collections, pages, and policies by default. Medium-priority resources like menus and metafields on request.
description.zh: 支持 Shopify 全部 30 种可翻译资源类型。默认优先翻译商品、集合、页面和政策；菜单、Metafields 等中优先级资源按需翻译。

description.en: Generates a structured CSV with original and translated content side by side, including status (NEW / OUTDATED / CURRENT) for every field, so you can review and edit before anything is written.
description.zh: 生成结构化 CSV，原文与译文并排展示，每个字段标注状态（NEW / OUTDATED / CURRENT），方便在写入前审核和修改。

description.en: Detects translations that have become outdated because the source content changed. Flags them for re-translation while skipping up-to-date content.
description.zh: 检测因原文更新而过期的翻译，标记需要重新翻译的字段，同时跳过已是最新的内容。

description.en: After translation, automatically checks every market's locale configuration, detects which markets are missing the new language, and guides you through setup. Can create new markets with country regions, configure subfolder URLs (e.g. /de/, /ja-jp/, /zh-cn/), and set the correct default and alternate locales — all without leaving the workflow.
description.zh: 翻译完成后自动检查每个市场的语言配置，检测哪些市场缺少新语言，并引导您完成设置。可以创建带国家区域的新市场、配置子文件夹 URL（如 /de/、/ja-jp/、/zh-cn/）、设置正确的默认和备选语言——全程无需离开工作流。

description.en: Supports Shopify's native CSV export/import flow. Read a Shopify-exported translation CSV, apply AI translations with strict skip rules for handles, prices, Liquid code, and HTML structure, then import the filled CSV back to Shopify.
description.zh: 支持 Shopify 原生 CSV 导出/导入流程。读取 Shopify 导出的翻译 CSV，按严格规则跳过 handle、价格、Liquid 代码和 HTML 结构，AI 翻译后直接导入回 Shopify。
